single_h100: Materialize the public Parameter Golf challenge cache into local disk before launching the Rust-only single-H100 trainer.
Keep the fixed fineweb_val_* first-50k-doc validation split identity explicit in the contract.
distributed_8xh100: Reuse the same dataset and tokenizer identity for the later RunPod 8xH100 lane unless a materially different shard layout is introduced.
post_hoc_allowed: Remote object upload can be deferred until Google operator authority is available, but later launch profiles must keep the descriptor URI stable.
